name: Aventurine
description:
🃏 | Against all odds

› Trapped in the abyss after his grand final act, Aventurine perseveres to escape. In the end, he succeeds and returns back in the waking world. With new sense of liberation, he finds his will to live.

True story no clickbait ong (this is me coping)

› | This is the fate of a gem
